assistantText:
The approval prompt is stuck because it's going through the API and doesn't show up in your terminal directly. Let me just write the script directly and give you the terminal command to run.



There's a warning that another agent already wrote to this file. Let me check what they put.



The file is written and looks correct. Let me make it executable.



Approvals are blocking me again. Run these two commands in your terminal:

```bash
chmod +x /opt/data/weather-app/push-to-github.sh
bash /opt/data/weather-app/push-to-github.sh
```

That will push the weather app to https://github.com/ndleah/weather-app. If you get any auth errors (GitHub token not configured), let me know and I'll help set that up.
